craigslist.title: Simply stunning garden-style Studio in Long Beach
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Monthly Price: $1512 - $1724 *Optional and usage-based charges not included. Contact office to confirm pricing details and included fees. SIZE: 378 sq ft | BEDROOMS: Studio | BATHROOMS: 1 LEASE TERMS: 12-Month Contact us for more information! show contact info ABOUT COMMUNITY: Step into the future of living at The Ray Apartments in Long Beach, CA! Our freshly renovated community shines with modern elegance, offering studio, one-, and two-bedroom apartments tailored to your unique lifestyle. Bask in the glow of our exceptional amenities: a basketball court, tennis courts, a refreshing swimming pool, a stylish resident clubhouse, convenient underground parking, a cutting-edge fitness center, and a welcoming pet-friendly atmosphere. Unwind on your private or semi-private patio or balcony, soaking in the coastal breeze. Perfectly positioned just two minutes from the 91 Freeway, you're moments away from Long Beach's picturesque shores or the vibrant pulse of Los Angeles. Experience the ray of perfection-schedule your tour at The Ray Apartments today! Pet Policy: Pets - Max 2 allowed. Pet Rent $50.00/month (per pet) Deposit $400.00 (for both pets). Breed Restrictions apply. Ask for details. APARTMENT FEATURES: ◾ Air Conditioner ◾ Breakfast Bars (select units) ◾ Ceiling Fan ◾ Dishwasher ◾ Disposal ◾ Large Closets ◾ Mirrored Closet Doors (select units) ◾ Patio/Balcony ◾ Stove ◾ Wood-Like Plank Flooring (select units) COMMUNITY FEATURES: ◾ Basketball Court ◾ Fitness Center ◾ Free Weights ◾ Gated Access ◾ Laundry Care Center ◾ Olympic-size Swimming Pool ◾ Parking Garage (Assigned Spaces) ◾ Pickleball ◾ Tennis Court ◾ High-Speed Internet ◾ Resident Clubhouse ◾ Street Parking CONTACT US TODAY! The Ray Apartments 6479 Atlantic Ave Long Beach, CA 90805 Mon - Sun: 8:30 AM - 5:00 PM Contact us for more information! show contact info Website: www.apt-rental.com?n=ray&rp=rzi1Aobqd21i&t=wb Online Application: www.apt-rental.com?n=ray&rp=rzi1Aobqd21i&t=ap 3D Virtual Tour: www.apt-rental.com?n=ray&rp=rzi1Aobqd21i&t=trt Schedule a Tour: www.apt-rental.com?n=ray&rp=rzi1Aobqd21i&t=sch Parking is first come first serve, however, we offer reserved parking at an additional cost. THE REMM GROUP (DRE LICENSE #01949006) All pricing, availability, fees, and terms are subject to change without notice. EQUAL HOUSING OPPORTUNITY A1257CA7B5CE4A
